integration_stage_refs.proves: Standing remains mediated, trace-bound, and authority-preserving for the inhabitant runtime.
Citizen state remains private, stale-state aware, and projection-bounded.
Lifecycle state remains explicit and reviewable before inhabitant execution claims.
Memory and identity stay witness-backed and observatory-linked instead of theatrical.
Theory-of-mind reasoning remains bounded to reviewable, non-spoofed surfaces.
Runtime capability claims remain tied to reviewed intelligence metrics rather than self-assertion.
Learning remains governed, rollback-aware, and dependent on reviewed cognition surfaces.
Access control and observatory projection remain redacted, authority-scoped, and reviewable.
Communication remains bound to ACIP hardening and local authenticated-envelope policy.
A2A remains an adapter over ACIP rather than a second communication model.
The bounded integrated CSM run provides the deterministic agent-shaped execution spine for the inhabitant proof.

proof_summary: WP-15 integrates standing, citizen state, lifecycle, memory identity, theory-of-mind, intelligence metric, governed learning, access control, ACIP/A2A communication boundary, and the bounded integrated CSM run into one agent-shaped runtime proof packet and deterministic operator report.
non_claims: does not claim a first true birthday or personhood event
does not claim autonomous federation or external communication readiness
does not bypass lifecycle state, Freedom Gate, ACC, trace, redaction, or review boundaries
does not replace the WP-16 observatory-visible flagship demo
claim_boundary: This packet proves one bounded v0.91.1 integrated agent-shaped runtime surface by connecting the already-landed standing, state, lifecycle, memory, communication, access, observatory, and trace artifacts into one deterministic proof/report route. It does not prove birthday completion, personhood, unbounded autonomy, or the full WP-16 flagship demo.
